steps.title: Convert years to months
steps.content:
Since $1$ year is $12$ months, $k$ years is
$$12k$$
months.

steps.title: Count the growth intervals
steps.content:
The shrub grows $71$ centimeters every $m$ months. In $12k$ months, the number of intervals is
$$\frac{12k}{m}$$

steps.title: Multiply by the growth amount
steps.content:
Multiply $71$ centimeters by the number of intervals:
$$71(\frac{12k}{m})=\frac{852k}{m}$$
The answer is D.
